args.summary:
User Amelia Davis (user ID: amelia_davis_8890) wants to cancel two specific single-passenger reservations:

1. Reservation UDMOP1 - Basic economy round trip SFO (May 28-29), 1 passenger (Amelia Davis). User understands this may not qualify for cancellation under normal policy but wants to proceed anyway to give up seat.

2. Reservation 4XGCCM - Business class round trip IAH-DTW (May 3-4), 1 passenger (Amelia Davis). These flights are in the past (May 3-4) and have likely been flown, requiring special handling.

User explicitly stated they want to cancel both reservations even if no refund is received, as they want to give up their seats for others who might need them.
